victim.value: Major-General J.B. Heatherstone, pursued by Eastern mystics, drowned as foretold

closed_world.value: Cloomber Hall and surrounding Scottish coast during a storm
closed_world.quote: HOW FOUR OF US CAME TO BE UNDER THE SHADOW OF CLOOMBER

culprit_and_motive.value: Eastern mystics with supernatural powers seeking revenge against Heatherstone
culprit_and_motive.quote: a school of philosophers and of savants who, working on different lines from his own

resolution.value: Narrator John West explains the supernatural pursuit and validates Eastern mystical powers
resolution.quote: I, John Fothergill West, can confidently answer that science is wrong.

investigator.value: John Fothergill West, law student and narrator documenting the events
investigator.quote: I John Fothergill West, student of law in the University of St. Andrews

red_herring.value: The supernatural elements and Eastern mysticism appear to be misdirection from what may be more mundane explanations for the general's fears and death
red_herring.quote: Science will tell you that there are no such powers as those claimed by the Eastern mystics

clue_fairness.value: The narrator explicitly promises transparency and provides newspaper clippings as evidence available to readers
clue_fairness.quote: My highest ambition is that those who know something of the matter should...indorse it without finding a single paragraph

social_world.value: Military hierarchy and colonial power structures - Major-General Heatherstone's fear of dark faces and Eastern pursuers reflects imperial anxieties
social_world.quote: the general's fear of dark faces, of wandering men (not knowing how his pursuers might come after him)

reveal_mechanic.value: Multiple narrative perspectives including statements, day-books, and witness accounts to demonstrate the truth
reveal_mechanic.quote: STATEMENT OF ISRAEL STAKES...NARRATIVE OF JOHN EASTERLING...THE DAY-BOOK OF JOHN BERTHIER HEATHERSTONE

media_and_audience.value: Newspaper reports frame the general's death as drowning, contrasting with the supernatural explanation the narrator believes
media_and_audience.quote: I wonder if by chance there was any other human eye but mine which traced a connection between these paragraphs

investigator_wound.value: The narrator John West struggles between rational law training and belief in supernatural forces, creating internal conflict
investigator_wound.quote: I John Fothergill West, student of law in the University of St. Andrews...can confidently answer that science is wrong

_meta.title: ebook sir arthur conan doyle the mystery of cloomber
